title: JOY Manifest Root
description: Schema for a JOY Manifest Root snapshot. Candidate Merkle roots are informational only and do not imply verification.

schema_version.description: Version of the manifest root schema.

snapshot_id.description: Identifier for this manifest snapshot within JOY.

created_from.description: Source used to construct the snapshot (for example, leaves.sha256).

leaf_manifest.description: Collection of leaf manifest paths or identifiers participating in this snapshot.

leaf_count.description: Number of leaves included in this snapshot.

candidate_root.description: Informational candidate Merkle root value. This field does not claim verification.

authority.description: JOY authority boundary. Must be false.

execution.description: Execution boundary. Must be false; manifest roots do not trigger actions.

verification.description: Verification boundary. Must be false; JOY does not verify cryptographic truth.

boundary.const: JOY records semantic continuity. ReceiptOS verifies canonical artifacts. AL consumes verified artifacts.
boundary.description: Explicit boundary statement for JOY, ReceiptOS, and AL.
